name_cn:
White Crocodile Gold Clasp·
CASSANDRE _Chain Bag A super practical mini bag, Italian imported original crocodile leather, full leather interior and exterior. Classic metal logo highlights personality, flip-top design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap, bag features ten card slots, one bill compartment, two dividers, and one zippered interior pocket to hold it all!
Model: 743364
Size: 23x14x3cm
Strap Length: 47cm
